title: Input/output/inout does not appear in port list: 'clk_i'

features.name: interface with empty parameter list and port declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface with an empty parameter list followed by port declarations in the port list

features.name: virtual interface with input port in empty parameterized interface
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface declaration accessing an interface that has an empty parameter list and input port
